title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXXIX. Songs.
content:
Lend me thy mare to ride a mile?
        She is lamed, leaping over a stile.
        Alack! and I must keep the fair!
        I'll give thee money for thy mare.
        Oh, oh! say you so?
        Money will make the mare to go!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CXXXIX. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
